title: ALP shared board preset
description: Schema for a shared board definition under metadata/boards/<name>.yaml.  Referenced from project board.yaml files via the top-level `preset:` field.  Exists only as SDK-internal plumbing so multiple projects targeting the same physical board (e.g. the EVK + its ~40 demo apps) share one source of truth for chip population + E1M-pad routing.  Customers building a custom board put these fields inline at the top level of their board.yaml instead.

name.description: Board name.  Used in include/alp/boards/alp_<name>_routes.h + as the board identity in generated Doxygen blocks.

hosts_som_families.description: SoM families this board mechanically + electrically supports (alif-ensemble, renesas-rzv2n, ...).  The validators reject `board.yaml` files that pair a shared board preset with a SoM preset whose `family:` is not listed here.

populated.description: Per-component populated flags.  Keys match chip-driver / block names; each `true` enables the corresponding CONFIG_ALP_SDK_{CHIP,BLOCK}_<name>=y.

e1m_routes.description: E1M-pad routing.  scripts/gen_board_header.py reads this block and emits include/alp/boards/alp_<name>_routes.h.

defaults.description: Reference-design app defaults (e.g. canonical display chip, primary IMU).

audio.description: Carrier audio path (codecs + I2S bus + MCLK + I2S path-mux + amp control GPIOs) the Linux DT / audio-graph-card is generated from.  Captures device-instance facts (I2C addresses, L/R channel, mux + shutdown/IRQ GPIO macros) beyond the E1M-pad routing in e1m_routes.

hw_revisions.description: Per-rev metadata (min/max SDK versions, board_id ADC channel + thresholds, status, notes).

route_entry.description: Mirrors board.schema.json's route_entry (the shared preset carries the same e1m_routes shape a customer would write inline).  Keep the two in lockstep.

doc.description: One-line Doxygen @brief documenting what the pad is wired to on this board.

active_low.description: Board convention -- pressed/asserted = 0 V.  Documentation only; the app passes ALP_GPIO_ACTIVE_LOW at alp_gpio_open() time if it wants auto-inversion.

pull.description: Physical pull-resistor present on the PCB (board-static fact).  Apps still pass the matching ALP_GPIO_PULL_{UP,DOWN} at alp_gpio_open() time -- this field documents what the board ships with, it does not drive the controller's internal pulls.

debounce_ms.description: RC-debounce time constant in milliseconds for the board's hardware debounce (mostly buttons).  Documentation hint; the app may add software debounce on top.

board_alias.description: Portable cross-EVK alias (e1m-spec STANDARD.md §7.2 common role). gen_board_header.py emits `#define <board_alias> <macro>` into the generated routes header. The SAME board_alias MUST be declared on every board that exposes the role (enforced by tests/scripts/test_board_alias_parity.py).

route_entry_list_gpio.description: GPIO routes.  Accepts the IO pads (E1M_GPIO_IO<N>) and the GPIO-secondary index of any analog/timer pad (E1M_GPIO_PWM<N> / ADC<N> / DAC<N> / ENC<N>_<X|Y>).  The `E1M_X_` prefix form covers the 45x65 E1M-X form factor's connector namespace.
